What We Do

Complete Junk Removal Solutions

From single-item pickups to full commercial cleanouts — EcoWise handles it all with speed, discretion, and environmental responsibility.

Category 1

Real Estate & Property Management

Designed to accelerate sales closings and tenant turnovers.

Foreclosure & Eviction Cleanouts

Complete property clearing after evictions or foreclosures. Discretion and speed guaranteed.

Move-In / Move-Out Services

Deep removal of post-move residue to leave the property market-ready fast.

Estate Clearance

Professional clearing of inherited properties with careful, respectful handling of personal items.

Listing Prep Debris Removal

Aesthetic cleanup for real estate photography. Listing-ready and photo-perfect, same day.

Category 2

Commercial & Office Solutions

Focused on efficiency and environmental compliance for businesses.

Office Furniture Removal

Desks, cubicles, ergonomic chairs, and full office furniture disassembly and removal.

E-Waste Recycling

Safe recycling of computers, monitors, printers, and servers — certified and compliant.

Retail & Restaurant Cleanouts

Clearing commercial spaces: display racks, vitrines, kitchen equipment, and more.

Ongoing Maintenance Contracts

Recurring service for office buildings, condos, or shopping centers — reliable and consistent.

Category 3

Construction & Heavy Duty

High-capacity services for contractors and renovation projects.

Renovation Debris

Post-renovation cleanup: drywall, lumber, tiles, insulation — all construction waste removed.

Concrete, Dirt & Brick

Safe handling and disposal of heavy, dense construction materials — no job too heavy.

Site Cleanup

Construction site cleaning to maintain safety and workflow throughout your project.

Category 4

Residential Premium Services

Classic services with the full EcoWise approach.

Garage, Attic & Basement

Full clearance of storage spaces that have accumulated years of clutter.

Appliance Removal

Refrigerators, washers, dryers, stoves — safely removed and responsibly disposed.

Large Item Disposal

Hot tubs, mattresses, heavy furniture, pianos — we handle what others won't.

Yard Waste

Branches, leaves, old fencing, and landscaping debris — your yard, reclaimed.

The Eco-Advantage

Why Choose EcoWise?

We're not just a hauling company — we're Austin's responsible waste solution.

Donation First

Not everything is junk. We sort items and donate usable goods to local Austin organizations before recycling — keeping our community strong.

Community-First Approach

Certified Disposal

We comply with all local waste management regulations, ensuring your junk never ends up in illegal dumpsites. Responsible from start to finish.

Fully Compliant & Certified

Realtor-Ready Efficiency

Time is money in real estate. We offer fast-response service so you never lose a single day on the market. Listing-ready, same day.

Same-Day Response Available
